pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 127 which writes this exact string to store_brief.txt. Westlake Avenue is a real street in Seattle. Address is synthetic but plausible.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 128 which writes 'Seattle, WA 98109' to store_brief.txt.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 128. WA is the correct postal abbreviation for Washington state.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 128. 98109 is a valid USPS zip code for Seattle, WA (South Lake Union area near Westlake Ave).
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 129 which writes 'United States'. WooCommerce stores this as 'US' or 'US:WA' in woocommerce_default_country option.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 131 which writes 'CURRENCY: USD ($)' to store_brief.txt.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 133 which writes 'TAX: Enable tax calculations.' to store_brief.txt. WooCommerce stores as woocommerce_calc_taxes='yes'.

Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 134 ('6.5%') and cross-referenced with WA Department of Revenue (dor.wa.gov): Washington state sales tax rate is 6.5% since 1983. WooCommerce stores rates with 4 decimal places (6.5000) in wp_woocommerce_tax_rates table.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 134 which writes 'state code WA (Washington)'. Matches the store address state.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 135 which writes 'Tax name: "WA Sales Tax"' to store_brief.txt.

Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv: rows with parent_category='Single Origin' have subcategory values 'African' (Ethiopian Yirgacheffe) and 'Americas' (Colombian Supremo). No other subcategories exist under Single Origin.
Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv: the row with parent_category='Blends' (Morning Symphony) has an empty subcategory field. No children.
Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv: all 3 rows with parent_category='Equipment' have empty subcategory fields. No children.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 145 which writes 'Name: Bag Size' to store_brief.txt.

Verified by WooCommerce slug generation convention: 'Bag Size' -> lowercase + hyphenate -> 'bag-size'. WooCommerce taxonomy becomes 'pa_bag-size'. Confirmed in export_result.sh which queries meta_key='attribute_pa_bag-size'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 146 which writes 'Values: 250g | 500g | 1kg' to store_brief.txt. Also matches the CSV column headers: price_250g, price_500g, price_1kg.

Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv row 1: name=Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, sku=SR-ETH-001, parent_category=Single Origin, subcategory=African, type=variable, price_250g=14.99, price_500g=26.99, price_1kg=48.99. All fields match.

Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv row 2: name=Colombian Supremo, sku=SR-COL-002, parent_category=Single Origin, subcategory=Americas, type=variable, price_250g=13.99, price_500g=24.99, price_1kg=44.99. All fields match.

Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv row 3: name=Morning Symphony, sku=SR-BLD-001, parent_category=Blends, subcategory=(empty), type=variable, price_250g=12.99, price_500g=22.99, price_1kg=41.99. Category 'Blends' refers to the parent_category since subcategory is empty. All fields match.
Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv row 4: name=Hario V60 Dripper, sku=SR-EQP-001, parent_category=Equipment, type=simple, regular_price=32.00. All fields match.
Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv row 5: name=Baratza Encore Grinder, sku=SR-EQP-002, parent_category=Equipment, type=simple, regular_price=169.99. All fields match.
Verified by parsing product_catalog.csv row 6: name=Fellow Stagg Kettle, sku=SR-EQP-003, parent_category=Equipment, type=simple, regular_price=89.95. All fields match.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 140 which writes 'SHIPPING ZONE: "Domestic US" covering United States' to store_brief.txt.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 141 which writes 'Flat Rate: $5.99' to store_brief.txt. WooCommerce stores flat rate cost in PHP serialized options as string '5.99'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 142 which writes 'Free Shipping: minimum order amount $75.00' to store_brief.txt. WooCommerce stores min_amount as '75' or '75.00' in PHP serialized settings.

Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 150 which writes 'Code: GRANDOPENING' to store_brief.txt. Note: WooCommerce lowercases coupon codes on save (post_title becomes 'grandopening'), but the verifier handles this with .lower() comparison.

Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 151 which writes 'Type: Percentage discount'. WooCommerce stores this as 'percent' in wp_postmeta with meta_key='discount_type'. Confirmed in verifier.py which checks gc.get('discount_type') == 'percent'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 152 which writes 'Amount: 20%'. WooCommerce stores as '20' (or '20.00') in wp_postmeta with meta_key='coupon_amount'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 153 which writes 'Usage limit: 500 total uses'. WooCommerce stores as '500' in wp_postmeta with meta_key='usage_limit'.

Verified by reading setup_task.sh line 154 which writes 'Expiry: December 31, 2026'. WooCommerce stores date_expires as Unix timestamp (1798675200 for 2026-12-31 UTC) in wp_postmeta. The verifier checks for existence of date_expires field, not exact format.

privileged_info_summary: All data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh. The task requires setting up a complete WooCommerce store for 'Summit Roasters.' The store address must be 415 Westlake Avenue, Seattle, WA 98109, US with currency USD. Tax calculations must be enabled with a 6.5% rate for Washington state (WA), which is the actual WA state sales tax rate. The product category hierarchy has 3 parent categories (Single Origin, Blends, Equipment) with 2 subcategories under Single Origin (African, Americas). A global product attribute 'Bag Size' (slug: bag-size, taxonomy: pa_bag-size) must be created with terms 250g, 500g, 1kg. There are 6 products total: 3 variable coffee products with Bag Size variations (Ethiopian Yirgacheffe SKU SR-ETH-001 in African category at $14.99/$26.99/$48.99, Colombian Supremo SKU SR-COL-002 in Americas at $13.99/$24.99/$44.99, Morning Symphony SKU SR-BLD-001 in Blends at $12.99/$22.99/$41.99) and 3 simple equipment products (Hario V60 Dripper SKU SR-EQP-001 at $32.00, Baratza Encore Grinder SKU SR-EQP-002 at $169.99, Fellow Stagg Kettle SKU SR-EQP-003 at $89.95, all in Equipment category). A shipping zone 'Domestic US' covering the United States must have flat rate $5.99 and free shipping for orders over $75. Coupon code GRANDOPENING (lowercased by WooCommerce to 'grandopening') must be a 20% percentage discount, limited to 500 uses, expiring December 31, 2026 (stored as Unix timestamp 1798675200). WooCommerce stores the country as 'US:WA' in woocommerce_default_country. Variable products require the agent to: change product type to Variable, go to Attributes tab, add Bag Size attribute with all values, check 'Used for variations', SAVE ATTRIBUTES (critical step), then go to Variations tab, generate variations, and set individual prices per variation.
